info.name: Amadeus Returns a List of Relevant Airports Near to a Given Point.

params.name: latitude
params.description: latitude location to be at the center of the search circle

params.name: longitude
params.description: longitude location to be at the center of the search circle

params.name: radius
params.description: radius of the search in Kilometer. Can be from 0 to 500, default value is 500 Km.

params.name: page[offset]
params.description: start index of the requested page

params.name: sort
params.description:
defines on which attribute the sorting will be done from the best option to the worst one:
* **relevance** - Score value calculated based on distance and traffic analytics
* **distance** - Distance from the location to the geo-code given in API request parameters
* **analytics.flights.score** - Approximate score for ranking purposes calculated based on estimated number of flights from/to airport in one reference year (last year)
* **analytics.travelers.score** - Approximate score for ranking purposes calculated based on estimated number of travelers in the airport for one reference year (last year)

items.docs: Amadeus Returns a List of Relevant Airports Near to a Given Point.
